examples.text: والخيري يشبه البنفسج في تدبيره وإفلاحه إلا أنه أقوى وأصبر وقد يبقي الأصفر منه ثلاث سنين وينفع الخيري كلما بنفع البنفسج.
examples.english: The wallflower is similar to the violet in its regimen and cultivation except that it is stronger and more enduring. The yellow one may persist three years. Everything is useful for the wallflower what is also useful for the violet.

etymology.text:
خَيْر (ḵayr, “good”) + ـِيّ (-iyy).

From Middle Persian hylyk' (/⁠hērīg⁠/, “wallflower”) (Classical Persian خیری (xêri)).
